RESIDENTIAL LEASE AGREEMENT

Landlord:
Cobalt Realty Group

Tenant:
Jordan Reyes

1. Term. Month-to-month tenancy beginning October 1, 2026.

2. Security Deposit. Tenant shall pay a security deposit equal to one month rent, in the amount of $1,400, due at signing.

3. Rent. The rent shall be $1,400.00, payable monthly in advance.

4. Late Fee. If rent is not received within 5 days of the due date, a flat late fee of $75 will be charged.

5. Entry. Landlord may enter with 48 hours notice, except in emergencies.
